title: [Cloud] Flamingo - Unpairing the charge case from the headset
scenario: Verify that unpairing the charge case from the headset results in the device being removed from the app, phone, and cloud, and reconnecting shows only the standalone headset without charge case info.
steps: In app, go to device settings > Reset Device, tap 'Clear' next to Clear Trusted Device list
Remove device from app and phone Bluetooth settings
On cloud web page, find and remove device
On cloud web page, find device
expected: Device visible as "Voyager Legend 50" with only headset info and image
